name: Metal Protective Film
subtitle: The best protective film for sandwich panels.

hero.title: Metal Protective Film
hero.description: PE protective film specifically designed for metal surface protection throughout the sandwich panel life cycle.

shortDescription: High-performance PE protective film engineered for metal surface protection, offering excellent UV resistance, anti-aging performance and clean removal without adhesive residue.
longDescription: Motisan Metal Surface Protective Film is a PE protective film specifically designed for metal surface protection, primarily used for sandwich panels throughout their product life cycle. Developed with holistic thinking, our double-anti film is easy to unwind and laminate while delivering excellent easy-peel performance after installation. Engineered to withstand Australia's demanding weather conditions, it incorporates anti-aging agents and UV stabilizers to provide long-lasting outdoor protection backed by a 6-month outdoor guarantee.

features.explain: Provides long-lasting outdoor protection with anti-aging agents and UV stabilizers. Remains durable and easy to remove after extended exposure.
Specially formulated adhesive adheres securely during manufacturing while allowing clean removal without residue.
Supports logo printing and branding applications with up to 3 colours.
Can be customised to suit specific metal surfaces and project requirements.

whyChoose: Motisan Metal Protective Film is specifically engineered for sandwich panel manufacturers and installers. Combining UV resistance, anti-aging protection and clean peel technology, it safeguards metal surfaces throughout production, transportation and installation. The film removes cleanly without residue, reducing labour costs while maintaining a professional finish.

seo.title: Metal Protective Film | Motisan
seo.description: PE protective film designed for sandwich panel and metal surface protection with UV resistance, anti-aging technology and easy peel performance.
